price_semantics.fwp: Factory Wholesale Price — the dealer/wholesale figure printed by the guide.
price_semantics.invoice: NOT published by the order guide. Null everywhere. FWP is a wholesale figure but is not the dealer invoice; no invoice approximation is made per task scope.
price_semantics.deltas: Option/package/color fwp & msrp are extra-cost DELTAS added on top of a configuration price, except trim.configurations which are fully-delivered prices (base + engine/transmission + quick order package, before destination).

provenance.notes: Extracted via pdfplumber word-coordinate reconstruction of the FCA 'Customer Preferred Code Guide' PDFs. Trims are selected by MODEL CODE + QUICK ORDER PACKAGE CODE. See order_guide_notes.md for ambiguities and page references.

scope_notes.absence_note: Neither the 4xe plug-in hybrid nor the 392 V8 appears in these 2026 order guides. 4xe is therefore NOT applicable to scenario building from this source. See order_guide_notes.md.
scope_notes.standard_equipment: Full per-trim STANDARD EQUIPMENT lists exist on JL pages 14-17 and JLU pages 24-28. They were not exhaustively transcribed into this file (task priority was priced/configurable items). Package CONTENT lists that ARE captured come from the GROUP DETAIL pages.

JL_2_door.name: Wrangler 2-Door (JL)

powertrains.notes: Standard powertrain; base MSRP is quoted for this config. Marked Late Availability on the guide.
+$2,500 MSRP over base (V6 manual). Engine N/C; the 8-speed automatic is the priced item.

JL_2_door.powertrain_note: 2-door offers two powertrains: 23-series = 3.6L V6 + 6-spd manual (base, late availability); 22-series = 2.0T + 8-spd auto (+$2,500 MSRP). The V6 with 8-spd auto (24-series) is NOT offered on the 2-door.

trims.name: Sport
trims.package_content_note: Sport is the base Quick Order Package; adds no content over base model.

package_content.description: Full Speed Fwd Collision Warn Plus

trims.name: Rubicon

package_content.description: Blind Spot and Cross Path Detection

trims.package_content_note: Content shown is the Rubicon standard equipment highlighted on the guide's package-content page (page 7). Rubicon is its own model code (JLJS72).

trims.name: Rubicon X
trims.package_content_note: Rubicon X = Rubicon + Rubicon X package. Net package value over Rubicon: W/23- (V6 manual) $9,950 MSRP / $8,956 FWP; W/22- (2.0T auto) $12,950 MSRP / $11,656 FWP. The 22Y (2.0T) config includes the factory 35-inch tire package, which accounts for the larger delta. Rubicon X adds Nappa leather (VL) at no charge and other content; the guide does not print a line-item content list for the Rubicon X package.

JLU_4_door.name: Wrangler 4-Door (JLU)

powertrains.notes: Standard powertrain on Sport/Willys/Rubicon; base MSRP quoted for this config. Late Availability. NOT offered on Sahara or Sport RHD.
On Sport/Willys/Rubicon: +$2,500 MSRP over V6 manual. On Sahara & Sport RHD the 2.0T auto (22G/22A) is the base engine (N/C).
V6 with 8-speed automatic. On Sport family: +$4,500 MSRP over V6 manual. On Sahara: 24G is +$2,000 over base 2.0T. 4-door only (not offered on 2-door).

JLU_4_door.powertrain_note: 4-door offers three powertrains: 23-series V6 6-spd manual (base on Sport/Willys/Rubicon, late availability), 22-series 2.0T 8-spd auto, and 24-series V6 8-spd auto. Sahara offers only 22G (2.0T, base) and 24G (V6 auto, +$2,000); no manual. Sport RHD offers only 22A (2.0T).

trims.name: Sahara
trims.package_content_note: Sahara is its own model code (JLJP74). Base engine is the 2.0T auto (22G, N/C); V6 auto (24G) is +$2,000. No manual offered. The guide does not print a line-item content list for the Sahara base package on the model page.

trims.name: Rubicon

package_content.description: Blind Spot and Cross Path Detection

trims.package_content_note: Content shown is the Rubicon standard equipment highlighted on the guide's package-content page (page 11). Rubicon is its own model code (JLJS74).

trims.name: Rubicon X
trims.package_content_note: Rubicon X = Rubicon + Rubicon X package. Net package value over Rubicon: W/23- (V6 manual) $9,950 MSRP / $8,956 FWP; W/22- or W/24- $12,950 MSRP / $11,656 FWP. The 22Y/24Y configs include the factory 35-inch tire package. Rubicon X adds Nappa leather (VL) at no charge; the guide does not print a line-item content list for the Rubicon X package.

trims.name: Sport RHD
trims.package_content_note: Right-hand-drive Sport (JLUL74), typically a fleet/mail-route variant. Single configuration (22A, 2.0T auto). The guide devotes pages 16-18 to this model; only the base price is captured here. Detailed RHD options were not fully enumerated.
